scripts.build: mkdir -p public/uv public/baremux public/epoxy && cp node_modules/@titaniumnetwork-dev/ultraviolet/dist/uv.bundle.js public/uv/uv.bundle.js && cp node_modules/@titaniumnetwork-dev/ultraviolet/dist/uv.handler.js public/uv/uv.handler.js && cp node_modules/@titaniumnetwork-dev/ultraviolet/dist/uv.sw.js public/uv/uv.sw.js && cp node_modules/@mercuryworkshop/bare-mux/dist/index.js public/baremux/index.js && cp node_modules/@mercuryworkshop/bare-mux/dist/worker.js public/baremux/worker.js && cp node_modules/@mercuryworkshop/epoxy-transport/dist/index.mjs public/epoxy/index.mjs && sed -i '1iimportScripts("uv.bundle.js"); importScripts("uv.config.js");' public/uv/uv.sw.js
